title: Submitting a Proficiency Exam
content:
Submitting a Proficiency Exam
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for FACULTY AND STAFF use (Chairpersons and Deans only).

Contact: registration@morgan.edu
Effective Date: 5/10/2024

---

IMPORTANT POLICY CHANGES
As of 5/10/2024, only a chairperson or dean may submit a proficiency exam form. The graded proficiency exam must be attached to the submission. The form is approved by the Dean of the respective area. The form is only accessible on the chairperson/dean dashboard.

---

DASHBOARD IMPORTANT LINKS
The following links are available on the chairperson/dean dashboard:
- Faculty/Staff Resources Drive
- Degreeworks Substitution/Exception & Waive
- Grade Change Form
- Proficiency Exam Form
- Curricudog
- Coursedog
- Dashboard Transfer Credit Students 2023/2024
- Student Dashboard

---

PROFICIENCY EXAM DETAILS
A passed proficiency exam results in earned credit for the student. The student is responsible for per-credit charges associated with the earned credits. Full-time students will not incur additional charges.

---

FORM FIELDS

Student's ID Number: Enter the student's 8-digit ID number. You can find this via Faculty Self Service in Websis.

Student Last Name: Enter the student's last name.

Student First Name: Enter the student's first name.

Instructor Name: Enter the name of the instructor who administered the proficiency exam.

---

SUBMISSION ACKNOWLEDGMENT
By submitting this form, you agree that the Office of Registrar may increase the student's maximum credit hours to enroll the student if necessary to accommodate the proficiency exam credit.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Proficiency Exam Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1r8JXU9w4-Rp1jZr-byJXoJLXPfEwpxTO/view)
